subcodes.first_line: O leaf stirred by the breezes of love for the Beloved of all the worlds, His honour Ibn-i-Asdaq, upon him be the Glory of God, the Most Luminous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مهتزه بنسائم محبت محبوب عالمیان جناب ابن اصدق علیه بهاء الله الابهی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @music and singing, @Shrines and Holy places
